use_cases: User onboarding through multi-step registration flows
Account creation wizards with progressive disclosure
Checkout processes broken into manageable steps
Application forms split across sequential steps to reduce friction
ai_summary: A multi-step registration stepper component that guides users through sequential stages of a process. Built with shadcn/ui patterns using Radix UI and Tailwind CSS for accessible, keyboard-navigable workflows commonly used in SaaS onboarding and account creation.
